description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a compact, angular design with a heavily armored exterior in a tan color scheme. The front showcases a reinforced cockpit with a transparent canopy, flanked by two large, sloped armor panels and prominent weapon mounts on each side. The sides reveal additional mechanical detailing, including cylindrical engine components and mounted blasters, while the rear is equipped with a ribbed, black heat-dissipation panel and a central red light. The vehicle's surface is covered in modular, interlocking armor plates, providing robust protection across all visible areas. Its overall form is low to the ground, with wide, flat surfaces and a distinctly futuristic, utilitarian appearance. The vehicle appears to be constructed primarily from interlocking plastic components, reminiscent of a LEGO-style build.
description: A tan, heavily armored combat vehicle with angular panels, side-mounted blasters, and a transparent cockpit canopy. Its modular, interlocking design and compact form give it a futuristic, tactical look.
description_view_0: Front view highlights the angular cockpit canopy, sloped armor panels, and dual weapon mounts flanking the central entry hatch.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals cylindrical engine details, side blaster mounts, and the layered armor structure along the vehicle's length.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the ribbed black heat-dissipation panel, central red light, and the broad, flat rear armor.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible engine components, blaster mounts, and detailed surface paneling.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts: two large blaster cannons on each side of the front, and two smaller mounts on the lower front corners.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, modular armor panels; reinforced cockpit area and side panels with interlocking construction.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color with some gray and black accent panels; no distinct camouflage pattern.
